title: FtsStatsResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag fts stats --json` on stdout as a single JSON line.

total_rows.description: Total number of rows present in the FTS5 index.

shadow_pages.description: Number of FTS5 shadow b-tree pages, or null when unavailable.

fts_functional.description: True when the FTS5 index is operational and can serve queries.
